How a project runs

Same four stages, whichever studio leads.

01 / BRIEF

Scope & strategy

We align on audience, goals and the deliverables that will move them.

02 / CONCEPT

Direction options

You choose from distinct creative directions before we build anything final.

03 / CRAFT

Production

Design, shoot, edit or animate — with structured check-ins, not surprise reveals.

04 / DELIVER

Handoff

Final files, source assets and guidelines, packaged for your team to use immediately.

About

Two studios, built to run as one team.

Amela started as a graphic design practice. Amela Premium Studios grew out of client demand to bring those brands to life on screen. Today they operate as sibling studios under Amela Creative Group — separate crafts, shared standards.

Meet the team

"A brand only holds together if it looks the same whether it's printed, scrolled, or played back."
— Amela Creative Group, founding note
Amela Graphics

Where the identity gets built

Amela Graphics is the design practice: logos, brand systems, packaging and digital design. The work is judged on one thing — does it hold up at any size, on any surface, for years, not just a launch quarter.

Every project ships with a guideline document, not just files, so the brand stays consistent long after we hand it off.

Amela Premium Studios

Where the identity moves

Amela Premium Studios handles everything that runs on a screen: video production, photography, motion graphics and post. Broadcast-grade craft, cut down for whatever platform it needs to live on.

Because both studios share a brand standard, a Studios production always matches the Graphics identity it's built from — no re-briefing required.

Home base — Kampala, Uganda

What we hold ourselves to

01

Craft over templates

Every project starts from the brief, not a preset — nothing goes out that could belong to another client.

02

One brand, every surface

Identity and motion are designed together, so nothing looks disconnected across print, web or screen.

03

Show the options

You see real creative directions before production, not a single take-it-or-leave-it draft.

04

Deliver to use, not just to look at

Source files, guidelines and export formats — ready for your team the moment we hand off.

Capabilities

Brand StrategyLogo DesignPackagingPrint Collateral Web DesignUI/UXSocial TemplatesVideo Direction CinematographyPhotographyMotion Graphics2D/3D Animation EditingColor GradingSound Design
Our Team

The people behind the work.

Specialists in identity and in motion — aligned on one standard of finish, whether the deliverable is a logo file or a finished cut.

Amela Creative Group runs as two sibling studios under one roof in Kampala. Each team leads its discipline but shares review standards, so a brand looks consistent from packaging to playback.
